Records.authors: Becchetti, Matteo, Dlapa, Christoph, Zoia, Simone
Records.location: Eq. (2), Section 'Setting the stage'; propagators in Table 1 of arXiv:2404.12325 (family PB_B)
Records.description: Pentagon-box two-loop five-point integral family ($PB_B$) contributing to the leading-color two-loop QCD amplitude for $t\bar{t} + \text{jet}$ production at hadron colliders. Two external legs are massive (top quarks, $p_1^2=p_2^2=m_t^2$) and three are massless. The family has 8 propagators and 3 irreducible numerators, with 121 master integrals. Canonical differential equations are constructed for the first time for this family, which involves elliptic functions (from an elliptic curve associated with a sunrise-type subsector), nested square roots $\sqrt{n_\pm}$, and six simple square roots. The canonical DE connection matrix decomposes into 112 linearly independent one-forms: 83 dlog forms (including 13 new ones with nested square roots) and 29 elliptic one-forms. The elliptic functions $G_i$ are expressed as complete elliptic integrals of the third kind. A 'duplet' structure generalizing even/odd parity of square roots to nested square roots ($\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$ Galois symmetry) is identified.
